languages.text: {n}Геральдические символы, отлитые в благородной бронзе, вне всяких сомнений принадлежат династии фон Валанциус. В них сложно рассмотреть что-либо необычное.{/n}
{n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. You struggle to discern anything unusual in them.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Геральдические символы, отлитые в благородной бронзе, вне всяких сомнений принадлежат династии фон Валанциус. В них сложно рассмотреть что-либо необычное.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. You struggle to discern anything unusual in them.{/n}
{n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. You struggle to discern anything unusual in them.{/n}
{n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. You struggle to discern anything unusual in them.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los símbolos heráldicos de bronce pertenecen indudablemente a la dinastía von Valancius. No notas nada raro en ellos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. You struggle to discern anything unusual in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los símbolos heráldicos de bronce pertenecen indudablemente a la dinastía von Valancius. No notas nada raro en ellos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这些用贵重青铜铸成的纹章毫无疑问属于冯·瓦兰修斯王朝。你竭力分辨，却未能发现任何异常。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. You struggle to discern anything unusual in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这些用贵重青铜铸成的纹章毫无疑问属于冯·瓦兰修斯王朝。你竭力分辨，却未能发现任何异常。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les symboles héraldiques coulés dans un bronze des plus nobles appartiennent sans doute possible à la dynastie von Valancius. Vous avez beau les scruter, vous ne remarquez rien de particulier.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. You struggle to discern anything unusual in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les symboles héraldiques coulés dans un bronze des plus nobles appartiennent sans doute possible à la dynastie von Valancius. Vous avez beau les scruter, vous ne remarquez rien de particulier.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Soylu bronzdan dökülmüş hanedan sembolleri, şüphesiz von Valancius hanedanlığına ait. İçlerinde olağan dışı bir şey görmekte zorlanıyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. You struggle to discern anything unusual in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Soylu bronzdan dökülmüş hanedan sembolleri, şüphesiz von Valancius hanedanlığına ait. İçlerinde olağan dışı bir şey görmekte zorlanıyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}貴金属の鋳造で描かれた紋章は、間違いなくフォン・ヴァランシウス家のもの。紋章に何か異常な点があるのか、よく見ないとわからない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The heraldic symbols cast in noble bronze are undoubtedly from the von Valancius dynasty. You struggle to discern anything unusual in them.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}貴金属の鋳造で描かれた紋章は、間違いなくフォン・ヴァランシウス家のもの。紋章に何か異常な点があるのか、よく見ないとわからない。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die in Bronze gegossenen heraldischen Symbole gehören zweifellos der Dynastie derer von Valancius. Dir fällt nichts Ungewöhnliches an ihnen auf.{/n}
